sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22760" key="grammatodidaskalei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γραμμᾰτο-δῐδασκᾰλεῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n22760.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">γραμματεῖον</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.712a</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
